title: Integrated%20Driving%20Licences%20&%20Vehicle%20Registration%20System%20(IDLVRS)%20Liberia%20Case%20Study
content:
/CASE STUD Y
IDLVRS (INTEGRATED 
DRIVING LICENSES AND 
VEHICLE REGISTRATION 
SYSTEM)Drivers


The Ministry of Transport (MoT), based in Monrovia with regional oﬃces 
across Liberia, oversees transportation policies and regulations. Its Depart-
ment of Land Transport Regulatory Services (DLTRS) manages driver's 
licenses and vehicle registration.
Road transport is Liberia’s main mode of travel for passengers and goods. 
To support this sector, the Ministry was established by an Act of the 
National Legislature on August 25, 1987.
MoT formulates and enforces policies for land, sea, and air transport while 
ensuring compliance with insurance standards in partnership with local 
agencies.
The Department of Land Transport Regulatory Services (DLTRS) had a 
basic system for issuing driving licenses and vehicle registration but 
lacked full automation, integration, and security, impacting eﬃciency.
DLTRS struggled to meet growing demands from citizens and businesses 
while managing increasing vehicle-related data, straining the system 
further.
To resolve these issues, the Ministry of Transport (MoT) initiated the 
procurement of the Integrated Drivers License and Vehicle Registration 
System (iDLVRS). This advanced system automates vehicle registration, 
licensing, operator registration, and the issuance of driving licenses and 
professional driving permits.
The project aims to modernize and integrate all road transport activities, 
ensuring eﬃcient, secure, and transparent service delivery.
Techno Brain assessed driving license operations, covering testing, 
issuance, renewals, traﬃc oﬀence endorsements, and data 
management. To enhance eﬃciency, enforcement, and revenue 
generation, we developed the Integrated Driver’s License and Vehicle 
Registration System (iDLVRS), integrating advanced technology and best 
practices.
Our /f_lexible solution adapts to various work/f_lows and space constraints. It 
features signature and photo capture, document veri/f_ication, and 
seamless integration, ensuring reliability and fraud prevention.
The SecuRegister system streamlines the process with a one-stop 
work/f_low, capturing biometric data, photos, signatures, and documents 
in a single step for same-day license issuance. It also supports vehicle 
registration, license plate issuance, and renewal stickers.
Designed for scalability, it integrates with third-party platforms, 
enhancing eﬃciency across Ministry of Transport centers and enabling a 
seamless registration experience.Cust omer:

 Major Features of the Solution 
ProvidedTechnologies
The IDLVRS system in a system with various modules embed in one 
system. It has various reporting items for various users like revenue, 
inventory, printing, etc. The high level features of the system are:
• Driver License registration and renewal 
• Motor Vehicle registration and renewal
• Business Eligiblity registration and renewal
• Ministry Dashboard & Management Information System  
• Administration module to add users, access control, and more
• Application tracking features to get the application status
• Audits
• Mobile App for veri/f_ication
• Enhanced service delivery – Service Decentralization• Web based Online Integrated Driving License and Vehicle 
Registration System 
• Microsoft SQL Server, Microsoft .NET, Web Services for real time 
integration with Revenue Authority and Banking system for 
payment collection and con/f_irmation
• Faster processing of the application and receiving driving 
licenses or/and vehicle plates on the same day
• Easy tracking of the application and its status
• Revenue collection increased for the government.
